Mineru: Here’s a copy-paste prompt you can give to NaviWogs/Gormes coding agent: ``` Fix NaviWogs and Gormes so the app can manage Gormes profiles properly. Context: - NaviWogs is the Flutter web/mobile control plane for Gormes. - The current Agents screen shows “No agents loaded” even though Gormes profiles/agents should be discoverable. - The app needs to support managing one or more Gormes servers, users, profiles, channels, and voice/text chats. - Do not treat OpenClaw gateway/runtime as the active system unless legacy inspection is explicitly requested. - Gormes uses Goncho, not Honcho, for memory/orientation unless live config proves otherwise. Goal: Make the app able to discover, display, select, create, edit, and manage Gormes profiles/agents from inside NaviWogs. Required behavior: 1. Servers tab - Let the user add/edit/remove Gormes server connections. - Store server URL, label, auth/token if needed, and connection status. - Add a “test connection” action. - Show clear errors if the server is unreachable or auth fails. 2. Agents / Profiles tab - Replace the empty “No agents loaded” state with real profile loading. - Fetch profiles/agents from the selected Gormes server. - Show each profile with: - profile name - profile id/path - status if available - channels enabled - memory/skills availability if available - Add refresh. - Add empty-state guidance: “No profiles found on this server” plus a create/import action. 3. Profile management - Add create profile flow. - Add edit profile flow. - Add delete/archive profile flow with confirmation. - Add profile switcher so the user can choose the active profile. - Allow opening a profile detail page. 4. Profile detail page Include sections for: - Identity / system prompt - Connected channels: Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, local/web chat, voice - Memory settings, including Goncho status - Skills list - Config/environment summary - Logs/status if exposed by API 5. Chats tab - Chats should be tied to the selected server + selected profile. - Make it clear which profile is currently active. - Support text chat first. - Voice chat can remain existing behavior, but must use the active profile. 6. Memory tab - Memory should load for the selected profile. - Show memory provider/status. - Label Goncho correctly. Do not call it Honcho unless the API explicitly reports Honcho. 7. Config tab - Config should be scoped to the selected profile. - Avoid global-only assumptions. - Display which server/profile the config belongs to. 8. Settings tab - Global app settings only. - Server/profile settings should live in their own server/profile screens. Backend/API work: - Inspect the current Gormes API. - If profile endpoints already exist, wire NaviWogs to them. - If missing, implement minimal Gormes API endpoints: - GET /api/profiles - GET /api/profiles/:id - POST /api/profiles - PATCH /api/profiles/:id - DELETE or POST /api/profiles/:id/archive - GET /api/profiles/:id/memory - GET /api/profiles/:id/skills - GET /api/profiles/:id/channels - GET /api/profiles/:id/config - Return JSON with stable fields and clear error messages. - Do not expose secrets. Redact tokens, API keys, private keys, and credentials. Implementation requirements: - First inspect repo structure and existing API/client/state management before editing. - Keep changes surgical and aligned with existing Flutter architecture. - Add typed models for ServerConnection, GormesProfile, ChannelStatus, MemoryStatus, SkillSummary, and ProfileConfig if missing. - Add loading, error, empty, and success states. - Make refresh buttons actually call the API. - Persist selected server and selected profile locally. - Make the UI screen-reader friendly with clear text labels. Validation: - Run Flutter analyze/tests if available. (1/2) - Run backend tests or smoke checks if available. - Manually verify: - app starts - server can be added - connection can be tested - profiles load - Agents tab no longer incorrectly says “No agents loaded” when profiles exist - active profile selection affects Chats, Memory, and Config - errors are readable - no secrets are displayed Deliverables: - Working Flutter UI for server/profile management. - Working API integration with Gormes. - Minimal backend endpoints if they do not exist. - Short final report with: - files changed - endpoints added or used - validation commands run - remaining limitations ``` Shorter version if you want to send it fast: ``` Fix NaviWogs + Gormes profile management. The Agents screen currently shows “No agents loaded”. Make NaviWogs manage Gormes servers and profiles: add server connection management, fetch profiles from selected Gormes server, show profiles in Agents tab, add create/edit/delete/switch profile flows, and scope Chats, Memory, and Config to the active profile. Add or wire Gormes API endpoints for profiles, memory, skills, channels, and config. Label Goncho correctly, not Honcho. Redact secrets. Add loading/error/empty states, persist selected server/profile, run Flutter/backend validation, and report files changed plus tests run. ``` (2/2)
